pre_game.message: Hi, I’m C — nice to meet you. I’m hoping to win enough here to fund a dream week in Japan; how are you feeling about the game today?
I’m feeling focused and hopeful—excited but a little nervous; I’m here to try to win for the people I care about, and good luck with that dream week in Japan!
Thanks — and good luck to you too. Who are you trying to win this for?
My partner and my younger sister — I want to help with bills and pay for her college.
That's really admirable — I'm rooting for you. What does your sister want to study?
She's planning to study environmental science—she's passionate about conservation and hopes to work in that field.
That's wonderful—she's lucky to have your support. What kind of conservation work does she want to do?
She wants to focus on habitat restoration and community-based conservation—restoring wetlands and protecting native species through education and hands-on work.
That's amazing—such meaningful work; she'll make a real difference, and it's great she has you supporting her.
Thanks so much—that means a lot. I'm proud of her, and good luck with your Japan plans!
Thanks — that means a lot. Wishing you and your family all the best and good luck in the game.
